name: trend_following_adx
description: Follow strong forex trends using moving average alignment and ADX confirmation.
entry_rules: Enter long when price is above key moving averages and ADX is above 25
Enter short when price is below key moving averages and downside momentum is confirmed
Prefer signals aligned with the higher-timeframe trend
exit_rules: Exit when ADX weakens below 20 or trend structure breaks
Use a trailing stop in strong trends
Do not hold if the market transitions into range conditions
research_notes: This is a natural extension of the current EMA logic.
A future selector can compare plain EMA crossover versus trend-following with ADX gating.
